data.name: Tololo

weaponImprint.name: Planeta
weaponImprint.trait: If the unit has full HP at the start of the action, they gain 1 random attack buff for 1 turn.
weaponImprint.effect: When a kill is made or after this unit's [effect:6f804ef0-64bc-4159-9eec-7a2240999500] ends, damage dealt by active skills is increased by 4%/5%/5%/5%/5%/5% 1/1/2/2/2/3 times, stacking up to 5/5/6/7/8/8 times. After reaching 5/5/6/7/8/8 stacks, gains 2/3/3/3/3/4 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef] after an active attack.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Increases damage dealt to ELIDs by 2.5%. If this unit is at max stability, increases it by an additional 2.5%.

data.effects: A serene Doll who finds solace under the starry sky. Hidden beneath her reticence is a delicate and sensitive soul. When the world slumbers, she confides in the vast cosmos and delights in the stars that seem to shine just for her.

skills.name: Meteor
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Aurora Curtain
skills.description: Fills Confectance Index to maximum at the start of the battle. After attacking, if Confectance Index is at max, consumes all of it and gains 1 instance of [effect:3fbcb8ae-7ffa-4e2e-9dce-1269da8ff4d2]. At the start of each action, for every 2 points of Confectance Index, gains 1 random buff until the end of the action. Each time an allied unit deals Hydro damage, this unit gains 1 stack of [effect:e0f1583f-a237-4f2e-aeaf-f11a44179f2a].
skills.descriptionLevel2: Fills Confectance Index to maximum at the start of the battle. After attacking, if Confectance Index is at max, consumes all of it and gains 1 instance of [effect:3fbcb8ae-7ffa-4e2e-9dce-1269da8ff4d2]. During the [effect:3fbcb8ae-7ffa-4e2e-9dce-1269da8ff4d2], this unit gains [effect:e0dbfa33-a7ac-440b-9dc3-24033bec351f], [effect:d57b4e35-45b8-4c7a-8521-afcd99c30dd9], [effect:74708574-8ab6-4216-a8d2-e28494703a9f], and [effect:a4596022-af69-4df2-abec-317af173ae0b] for 2 turns. At the start of each action, for every 2 points of Confectance Index, gains 1 random buff until the end of the action. Each time an allied unit deals Hydro damage, this unit gains 1 stack of [effect:e0f1583f-a237-4f2e-aeaf-f11a44179f2a].
skills.descriptionLevel3: Fills Confectance Index to maximum at the start of the battle. After attacking, if Confectance Index is at max, consumes all of it and gains 1 instance of [effect:3fbcb8ae-7ffa-4e2e-9dce-1269da8ff4d2]. During the [effect:3fbcb8ae-7ffa-4e2e-9dce-1269da8ff4d2], this unit gains [effect:e0dbfa33-a7ac-440b-9dc3-24033bec351f], [effect:d57b4e35-45b8-4c7a-8521-afcd99c30dd9], [effect:74708574-8ab6-4216-a8d2-e28494703a9f], and [effect:a4596022-af69-4df2-abec-317af173ae0b] for 2 turns. At the start of each action, for every 2 points of Confectance Index, gains 1 random buff until the end of the action. Each time an allied unit deals Hydro damage, this unit gains 1 stack of [effect:e0f1583f-a237-4f2e-aeaf-f11a44179f2a].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: During an [effect:3fbcb8ae-7ffa-4e2e-9dce-1269da8ff4d2], this unit gains [effect:e0dbfa33-a7ac-440b-9dc3-24033bec351f], [effect:d57b4e35-45b8-4c7a-8521-afcd99c30dd9], [effect:74708574-8ab6-4216-a8d2-e28494703a9f], and [effect:a4596022-af69-4df2-abec-317af173ae0b] for 2 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: The effects of [effect:e0f1583f-a237-4f2e-aeaf-f11a44179f2a] is enhanced, increasing critical rate and critical damage by 2%.

skills.name: Black Hole Inversion
skills.description: Select 1 enemy target within 8 tiles and deal Hydro damage equal to 130% of attack to it. If phase weakness is exploited, gain 2 points of Confectance Index.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Select 1 enemy target within 8 tiles and deal Hydro damage equal to 130% of attack to it. If phase weakness is exploited, this attack ignores 15% of Cover damage reduction and gain 2 points of Confectance Index.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: If a phase weakness is exploited, ignores 15% of Cover damage reduction for this attack.

skills.name: Supernova Impact
skills.description: Select 1 enemy target within 8 tiles and deal Physical damage equal to 130% of attack to it. If under the effect of 2 or more buffs, increase damage dealt by 20% and gain 2 points of Confectance Index.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Select 1 enemy target within 8 tiles and deal Physical damage equal to 130% of attack to it. If under the effect of 2 or more buffs, increase damage dealt by 20% and gain 2 points of Confectance Index. If under the effect of 3 or more buffs, deal Hydro damage instead and additionally gain 1 point of Confectance Index.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: If under the effect of 3 or more buffs, this attack deals Hydro damage. Additionally gain 1 point of Confectance Index.

skills.name: Morte Lumina
skills.description: Select 1 enemy target within 8 tiles and deal Hydro damage equal to 180% of attack to it. If under the effect of 3 or more buffs, increase damage dealt by 15% and reduce this skill's cooldown by 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Select 1 enemy target within 8 tiles and deal Hydro damage equal to 180% of attack to it. If under the effect of 3 or more buffs, increase damage dealt by 30% and reduce this skill's cooldown by 3 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Select 1 enemy target within 8 tiles and deal Hydro damage equal to 180% of attack to it. If under the effect of 3 or more buffs, increase damage dealt by 30% and reduce this skill's cooldown by 3 turns. If this kills the target, gain 1 point of Confectance Index.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: If under the effect of 3 or more buffs, increase damage dealt by 30% and reduce this skill's cooldown by 3 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: If this kills the target, gain 1 point of Confectance Index.

keys.effect: When Confectance Index is below max, increases damage dealt by 7%.
After using an active skill, Tololo gains 2 points of Confectance Index. If an allied unit (apart from Tololo) deals Hydro damage, the cooldown of Black Hole Inversion is reduced by 1 turn.
[effect:3fbcb8ae-7ffa-4e2e-9dce-1269da8ff4d2] increases mobility by 1 tile.
When using Black Hole Inversion, applies [effect:bba5e073-5719-4cc8-85d9-6de563caaa5e] to the target for 2 turns.
keys.displayTitle: Fixed Key 2 - Principles of Observational Astronomy

keys.effect: When [effect:3fbcb8ae-7ffa-4e2e-9dce-1269da8ff4d2] is triggered, gains [effect:13704d31-93dc-41f4-8ae8-52bf9ceb0a06] and [effect:82c6b99c-0a5e-4707-b81e-b6700f1b6dd8] for 1 turn.
When using Supernova Impact, if an allied unit performs a Support Attack before skill activation, applies [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] to the target for 1 turn.
When exploiting a phase weakness, cleanse 2 buffs from the target before attacking.
When at max HP and stability index, ignore 10% of the target's Cover damage reduction.

vertebrae.effect: If a phase weakness is exploited, ignores 15% of Cover damage reduction for this attack.

imagoforms.effect: When performing consecutive active attacks on the same enemy target in the same turn, damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Hydro damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets in Stability Break is increased by 10%.
Damage dealt by attacks that only hit 1 enemy unit is increased by 12%.

dollEffects.effectDetails:
